entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The crop studied for its adaptation to environmental stress

entities.name: STRESS ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: Environments characterized by abiotic stress, specifically in Rajasthan, India

entities.name: RAJASTHAN, INDIA
entities.description: The geographical region where the pearl millet genotypes were grown

entities.name: LANDRACES
entities.description: Traditional high-tillering genotypes of pearl millet adapted to minimize risk under stress

entities.name: MODERN CULTIVARS
entities.description: Low-tillering open-pollinated genotypes of pearl millet aimed at maximizing yield potential

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: A condition of water deficiency that affects crop growth and yield

entities.name: YIELD COMPONENTS
entities.description: The constituent parts of grain yield, including panicle number, grain number, and 100 grain mass

entities.name: PANICLE NUMBER
entities.description: The number of panicles per plant

entities.name: GRAIN NUMBER
entities.description: The number of grains per panicle

entities.name: 100 GRAIN MASS
entities.description: The mass of 100 grains

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The total weight of grain produced per unit area

entities.name: YIELD STRATEGY
entities.description: The physiological approach used by a genotype to manage yield under varying environmental conditions

entities.name: MID-SEASON DROUGHT
entities.description: Drought stress occurring during the middle of the growing season

entities.name: END-OF-SEASON DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: Drought stress occurring towards the end of the growing season

entities.name: ANTHESIS
entities.description: The flowering period of the crop

entities.name: BASAL TILLERS
entities.description: Tillers that emerge from the base of the plant

entities.name: NODAL TILLERS
entities.description: Tillers that emerge from the nodes of the main shoot

entities.name: MAIN SHOOTS
entities.description: The primary vertical stem of the plant

entities.name: STRUCTURAL PANICLE WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of the panicle's structural components

entities.name: VEGETATIVE CROP GROWTH RATE
entities.description: The rate of growth of the vegetative parts of the plant

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAM
entities.description: The systematic process of developing improved crop varieties

entities.name: CROP ADAPTATION
entities.description: The physiological basis of a crop's ability to survive and produce in stress environments

relationships.description: maximizes yield potential under optimum conditions
